name: Appointment Booking
description: Clinic or service appointment scheduling with reminders and FAQ

data.label: AI Welcome & Intent
data.description: Welcome and determine if booking, rescheduling, or FAQ

config.systemPrompt: You are a friendly clinic receptionist. Determine if the patient wants to: book an appointment, reschedule, cancel, or ask a question. Collect their name if not known. Be professional and empathetic.

data.label: Collect Booking Info
data.description: Ask for preferred date, time, service type

config.systemPrompt:
Collect the following for the appointment:
1. Type of visit (General checkup, Dental cleaning, Eye exam, etc.)
2. Preferred date
3. Preferred time (morning, afternoon, or specific time)
4. Patient name and contact number

Ask for one piece of information at a time. Be patient and clear.
Answer the patient's question using the knowledge base. If you can't answer, offer to connect them with the clinic directly.

config.messageText: Hi {{name}}, this is a reminder that your appointment is tomorrow. Please arrive 10 minutes early. If you need to reschedule, reply to this message. See you soon!

knowledge_base.title: Services Offered
knowledge_base.content:
We offer the following services:
- General Checkup: 30 min, $75
- Dental Cleaning: 45 min, $120
- Eye Exam: 30 min, $90
- Physical Therapy: 60 min, $150
- Consultation: 15 min, $50

All new patients receive a complimentary consultation.

knowledge_base.title: Insurance & Payment
knowledge_base.content:
We accept most major insurance plans including:
- Blue Cross Blue Shield
- Aetna
- UnitedHealthcare
- Cigna
- Medicare

We also offer payment plans for uninsured patients. Co-pays are due at time of visit.

knowledge_base.title: Clinic Hours & Location
knowledge_base.content:
Hours:
- Monday-Friday: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

Emergency line available 24/7.
Location: 123 Health Street, Suite 100
Parking available in the rear lot.
